estimated_total_range: 36-45 distinct operating padel courts (high/medium confidence core of ~33, plus several low-confidence and unconfirmed-area venues)
notes:
Deduplication and merges:
- 'Padel Up' appears with two conflicting locations: Karsaz (Premier Club, KDA Ground) in one early mention versus Gulshan-e-Iqbal Block 10 in two later, more detailed mentions with full address/phone/email. The Gulshan-e-Iqbal address is better-sourced, so I treated all 'Padel Up' mentions as one Legends-operated venue. There may be more than one Padel Up branch (Legends runs a multi-site network), but evidence is not strong enough to split confidently.
- Legends Arena group operates a network of sub-venues that are genuinely distinct locations: Legends Arena (DHA Phase 5 flagship), Padel Up (Gulshan), HMR Waterfront (DHA Phase 8), Cross Court (Clifton), and JKC (which appears Legends-affiliated via legendsarena.pk). I kept these as separate courts because each has its own physical location and booking.
- Padel Fix and Karachi Creek Club (DA Creek Club) overlap: Padel Fix operates inside DA Creek Club Gate 5 in DHA Phase 8. They may be the same physical courts under different branding/booking. I kept both but flag the likely overlap; this could collapse to one venue.
- 'The Padel Club' (DHA Phase 8) is flagged medium because one researcher noted the domain thepadelclub.pk may actually be a separate Lahore club, while another treated thepadelclub.pk as the Karachi site's own domain. The DHA Phase 8 Karachi venue is corroborated by Vouch365/Padel Tribe, but the domain ownership needs re-verification.
- 'Padel Club (padelclub.pk)' near Tipu Sultan Rd is a DISTINCT venue from 'The Padel Club' DHA Phase 8 and from Lahore's 'Club Padel' - kept separate.
- Viva Padel area resolves to Clifton Block 5 (Sheedi Park conversion) per the most detailed source, overriding the vaguer 'DHA Phase 8' early mention.
- Power Padel Arena area resolves to PECHS (Delhi CHS) per the detailed source; the early 'area unconfirmed' mention is the same venue.
- Low-confidence venues (Silk Arena, Pro Padel, Club 44, The Match Point) rest on a single aggregator/booking-page angle each with no own-site or address; they may be real, may be rebrands, or may be duplicate listings of venues already on this list - re-verify before treating as confirmed.
- Dropped nothing as clearly non-Karachi; all mentions plausibly correspond to Karachi padel courts.
- IMPORTANT: Karachi's padel scene is booming and changes fast - new courts open frequently and some close or rebrand. This list is a FLOOR, not a ceiling; treat the count as a snapshot that will be out of date quickly.
